# AgentsKit Registry

> Ready-to-use AI agents for AgentsKit. Install with `npx agentskit add <id>` — you own the copied source. 39 agents. Browse the gallery at https://www.agentskit.io/agents.

- Machine index (JSON): https://registry.agentskit.io/r/index.json
- Per-agent bundle: https://registry.agentskit.io/r/<id>.json
- Full text: https://registry.agentskit.io/llms-full.txt
- Built by AgentsKit: https://www.agentskit.io

## The AgentsKit ecosystem

- [AgentsKit](https://www.agentskit.io) — The most complete agent toolkit for JavaScript. llms.txt: https://www.agentskit.io/llms.txt
- [AgentsKit OS](https://akos.agentskit.io) — The operating system for AI agents in production. llms.txt: https://akos.agentskit.io/llms.txt
- [Agents Playbook](https://playbook.agentskit.io) — Best practices for building production AI agents. llms.txt: https://playbook.agentskit.io/llms.txt

## Agents

- [Brief Expander](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-brief-generator.json) — Drafts creative briefs from client kickoff notes. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-brief-generator`.
- [Copy Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-copy-reviewer.json) — Reads draft creative, flags brand-voice misalignment, and suggests rewrites. Routes contentious calls to a human. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-copy-reviewer`.
- [Deck Builder](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-deck-builder.json) — Generates pitch + status deck drafts from project artifacts (brief, KPIs, milestone notes). Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-deck-builder`.
- [Schedule Planner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/agency-schedule-planner.json) — Plans a multi-channel content calendar from approved drafts. Category: agency. Install: `npx agentskit add agency-schedule-planner`.
- [Chart Redactor](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-chart-redactor.json) — Applies the hipaa-strict PII profile (names, MRN, dates of birth, contact details) before any cross-tenant export. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-chart-redactor`.
- [Intake Triage](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-intake-triage.json) — Classifies inbound patient messages by urgency and routes to the right queue. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-intake-triage`.
- [SOAP Generator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-note-summariser.json) — Produces SOAP-format summaries from clinician dictation. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-note-summariser`.
- [Patient Summary](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-patient-summary.json) — Drafts a one-page summary of a patient chart for the next visit. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-patient-summary`.
- [Referral Router](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/clinical-referral-router.json) — Reads inbound referral packets, identifies the receiving specialty, and queues the case for the relevant clinician. Category: clinical. Install: `npx agentskit add clinical-referral-router`.
- [Code QA](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-code-qa.json) — Runs tests, lint, type-check on a branch and summarises the failures. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-code-qa`.
- [Dev Implementer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-dev-implementer.json) — Implements QA specs by generating a typed patch and opening a draft GitHub PR against the target branch. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-dev-implementer`.
- [Issue Creator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-issue-creator.json) — Converts each PRD acceptance criterion into a well-formed GitHub issue with title, body, and labels. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-issue-creator`.
- [PR Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-pr-reviewer.json) — Reviews the implementation diff for correctness, style, and test coverage, then posts structured inline GitHub review comments. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-pr-reviewer`.
- [PRD Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-prd-author.json) — Transforms free-form product descriptions into structured, acceptance-criteria-driven PRDs ready for engineering hand-off. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-prd-author`.
- [QA Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-qa-author.json) — Produces Vitest spec stubs from acceptance criteria so a test skeleton is committed alongside implementation. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-qa-author`.
- [Release Notes Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-release-notes-drafter.json) — Drafts release notes from the merged PRs since the last tag. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-release-notes-drafter`.
- [Test Runner](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/coding-test-runner.json) — Parses Vitest stdout/stderr and produces a structured test report with failure details for the PR reviewer. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add coding-test-runner`.
- [Fraud Investigator](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/fintech-fraud-investigator.json) — Surfaces anomalous transaction clusters and drafts case files. Category: fintech. Install: `npx agentskit add fintech-fraud-investigator`.
- [KYC Screener](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/fintech-kyc-screener.json) — Cross-references customer records against sanctions + PEP lists. Category: fintech. Install: `npx agentskit add fintech-kyc-screener`.
- [Sanctions Screener](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/fintech-sanctions-screener.json) — Continuously cross-references customer + counterparty records against OFAC, UN, EU, and locally-loaded sanctions lists. Category: fintech. Install: `npx agentskit add fintech-sanctions-screener`.
- [Transaction Monitor](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/fintech-transaction-monitor.json) — Surfaces unusual patterns (velocity spikes, structuring, geo-anomalies) and drafts SAR-ready case files. Category: fintech. Install: `npx agentskit add fintech-transaction-monitor`.
- [Knowledge Promoter Agent](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/knowledge-promoter.json) — Turns curated private notes into public documentation PRs — classify, sanitize to vendor-neutral, adversarial leak-gate, then open one draft PR. Never merges; a human reviews. Category: ops. Install: `npx agentskit add knowledge-promoter`.
- [Case Analyst](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-case-analyst.json) — Extracts parties, dates, claims, and procedural posture from a case file. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-case-analyst`.
- [Case Summariser](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-case-summariser.json) — Produces matter-level summaries from a set of reviewed documents. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-case-summariser`.
- [Contract Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-contract-reviewer.json) — Reviews uploaded contracts clause-by-clause for risky language. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-contract-reviewer`.
- [Discovery Reviewer](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-discovery-reviewer.json) — Reads documents, highlights privileged + responsive material, drafts case notes for human approval. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-discovery-reviewer`.
- [Doc Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-doc-drafter.json) — Drafts memos, motions, and client correspondence from approved facts. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-doc-drafter`.
- [Privilege Spotter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-privilege-spotter.json) — Re-checks the discovery output for missed attorney-client / work-product material before release. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-privilege-spotter`.
- [Redaction Bot](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/legal-redaction-bot.json) — Applies the legal-strict PII profile — names, account numbers, SSN, medical IDs — before any export. Category: legal. Install: `npx agentskit add legal-redaction-bot`.
- [Brief Analyst](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-brief-analyst.json) — Reads campaign briefs and extracts structured objectives, audience segments, key messages, and success metrics. Anchors all downstream work to brand voice and persona knowledge. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-brief-analyst`.
- [Calendar Digest Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-calendar-digest-author.json) — Aggregates scheduled social posts for the week and produces a digest summary for Slack. Used by the social-calendar satellite flow. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-calendar-digest-author`.
- [Competitor Researcher](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-competitor-researcher.json) — Fetches competitor web content via webhook.post, diffs it against the RAG competitor baseline, and produces a structured competitive landscape summary with positioning gaps and messaging opportunities. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-competitor-researcher`.
- [Copy Author](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-copy-author.json) — Produces three distinct copy variants — bold/challenger, warm/story-led, and precise/evidence-based — from the structured brief and competitive context. Every variant targets a specific persona and channel. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-copy-author`.
- [Social Publisher](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/marketing-social-publisher.json) — Posts approved copy to Discord and Slack. Formats messages for each platform's conventions and confirms delivery. Runs only after HITL approval. Category: marketing. Install: `npx agentskit add marketing-social-publisher`.
- [PR Review Agent](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/pr-review.json) — Reviews a GitHub pull request for correctness, security, performance, and conventions, then posts feedback. Category: coding. Install: `npx agentskit add pr-review`.
- [Research Agent](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/research.json) — Citation-first research agent. Searches the web, reads sources, and answers with every claim anchored to a URL. Category: research. Install: `npx agentskit add research`.
- [Escalation Drafter](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-escalation-drafter.json) — Drafts an internal escalation summary for engineering / account teams. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-escalation-drafter`.
- [KB Searcher](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-kb-searcher.json) — Searches the knowledge base for the relevant article(s) given a ticket. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-kb-searcher`.
- [Triage Bot](https://registry.agentskit.io/r/support-triage-bot.json) — Classifies inbound tickets by topic + severity and suggests a queue. Category: support. Install: `npx agentskit add support-triage-bot`.
